ddls:
CREATE TABLE "festivals" (
  "festival_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each festival */,
  "festival_name" TEXT /* Name of the festival */,
  "festival_description" TEXT /* Description of the festival */,
  "festival_location" TEXT /* Location of the festival */,
  "festival_type" TEXT /* Type of festival (e.g., National, International) */,
  "festival_website" TEXT /* Official website of the festival */,
  "festival_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the festival */,
  "festival_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the festival */,
  "festival_rules" TEXT /* Rules and regulations of the festival */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("festival_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ceremonies" (
  "ceremony_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ceremony */,
  "festival_id" INTEGER /* ID of the festival the ceremony belongs to */,
  "date_of_ceremony" TEXT /* Date of the ceremony */,
  "ceremony_location" TEXT /* Location of the ceremony */,
  "ceremony_theme" TEXT /* Theme of the ceremony */,
  "ceremony_sponsor" TEXT /* Sponsor of the ceremony */,
  "ceremony_host" TEXT /* Host of the ceremony */,
  "ceremony_broadcast_platform" TEXT /* Platform where the ceremony will be broadcast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ceremony_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ceremonies_festival_id FOREIGN KEY ("festival_id") REFERENCES festivals ("festival_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the award category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "category_type" TEXT /* Type of the category (e.g., Song, Album, Artist) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result type */,
  "result_name" TEXT /* Name of the result (e.g., Nominated, Awarded) */,
  "result_description" TEXT /* Description of the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nominees" (
  "nominee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nominee */,
  "nominee_name" TEXT /* Name of the nominee */,
  "nominee_bio" TEXT /* Biography of the nominee */,
  "nominee_contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the nominee */,
  "nominee_website" TEXT /* Official website of the nominee */,
  "nominee_social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles of the nominee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nominee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "works" (
  "work_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each work */,
  "work_title" TEXT /* Title of the work */,
  "work_description" TEXT /* Description of the work */,
  "work_release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the work */,
  "work_genre" TEXT /* Genre of the work */,
  "work_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the work */,
  "work_producer" TEXT /* Producer of the work */,
  "work_publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the work */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("work_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nominations" (
  "nomination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nomination */,
  "ceremony_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ceremony the nomination is for */,
  "nominee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the nominee */,
  "work_id" INTEGER /* ID of the work nominated */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the work is nominated for */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result (e.g., Nominated, Awarded) */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume or edition of the festival */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date of submission */,
  "submission_status" TEXT /* Status of the submission (e.g., Pending, Approved, Rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nomination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nominations_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nominations_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nominations_work_id FOREIGN KEY ("work_id") REFERENCES works ("work_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nominations_nominee_id FOREIGN KEY ("nominee_id") REFERENCES nominees ("nominee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nominations_ceremony_id FOREIGN KEY ("ceremony_id") REFERENCES ceremonies ("ceremony_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "judges" (
  "judge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each judge */,
  "judge_name" TEXT /* Name of the judge */,
  "judge_bio" TEXT /* Biography of the judge */,
  "judge_contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the judge */,
  "judge_expertise" TEXT /* Expertise of the judge */,
  "judge_experience" TEXT /* Experience of the judge in the music industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("judge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "judging_panels" (
  "panel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each panel membership */,
  "ceremony_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ceremony the panel is for */,
  "judge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the judge */,
  "panel_role" TEXT /* Role of the judge in the panel (e.g., Chair, Member) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("panel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_judging_panels_judge_id FOREIGN KEY ("judge_id") REFERENCES judges ("judge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_judging_panels_ceremony_id FOREIGN KEY ("ceremony_id") REFERENCES ceremonies ("ceremony_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sponsors" (
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsor */,
  "sponsor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sponsor */,
  "sponsor_description" TEXT /* Description of the sponsor */,
  "sponsor_contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the sponsor */,
  "sponsor_website" TEXT /* Official website of the sponsor */,
  "sponsor_industry" TEXT /* Industry of the sponsor (e.g., Music, Entertainment) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ceremony_sponsorship" (
  "sponsorship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsorship */,
  "ceremony_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ceremony the sponsorship is for */,
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sponsor */,
  "sponsorship_amount" REAL /* Amount of sponsorship */,
  "sponsorship_description" TEXT /* Description of the sponsorship */,
  "sponsorship_type" TEXT /* Type of the sponsorship (e.g., Monetary, In-kind) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsorship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ceremony_sponsorship_ceremony_id FOREIGN KEY ("ceremony_id") REFERENCES ceremonies ("ceremony_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ceremony_sponsorship_sponsor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sponsor_id") REFERENCES sponsors ("sponsor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Admin, Judge, Nominee) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission for the user (e.g., View Nominations, Edit Nominations) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "permission_id")
)
